case_title: MELISSA ISRAEL VS. THOMAS MCCARTHY ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-03-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-03-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF MELISSA ISRAEL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS THOMAS MCCARTHY AND BARBARA MCCARTHY ARE PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. CASE WAS HEARD TOGETHER WITH CSM-23-866472 AND CSM-23-866473. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED (EXHIBITS TOGETHER FOR TWO CASES CSM-23-866472 AND CSM-23-866473). VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ISRAEL, MELISSA AS TO DEFENDANT MCCARTHY, THOMAS MCCARTHY, BARBARA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ISRAEL, MELISSA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MCCARTHY, THOMAS MCCARTHY, BARBARA FAILED TO SUSTAIN BURDEN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-03-2023 - JUDGMENT.
